51

11. MERCURY-MARS-SUN-JUPITER-VENUS YOGA.
If these planets join at birth, the native will be sensuous, will have a fleet of horses, will do good
acts, be an Army chief, be dear to king, very fortunate and free from grief.
12. SUN-MARS-MERCURY-JUPITER-SATURN YOGA.
Should a native have these planets conjunct, he will be emotional, sick, will earn food by begging
going from House to House and will live in dilapidated Houses.
13. MARS-MOON-MERCURY-VENUS-SATURN YOGA.
One with these five planets together at birth will be troubled by wounds, imprisonment and
diseases, be learned, honoured by the people, be poor and deformed.
14. MARS-SATURN-SUN-VENUS-MERCURY YOGA.
One with the said five planets together will be troubled by diseases and enemies, be deprived of
position, subjected to much grief and will roam out of agony.
15. MOON-MARS-JUPITER-VENUS-SATURN YOGA.
